completed_tasks.name: Multi-index c2s transforms + oracle vendor build extension

remaining_tasks.name: Oracle gate closure + v1.0 UAT items

blockers.description: Latest `cargo test` run failed in `cintx-compat` source-only gate tests before Wave 4 started.
blockers.workaround: Re-run `cargo test -p cintx-compat --lib` after completing 10-06 and inspect source-only manifest gating path if failures persist.

decisions.decision: PTR_ENV_START=20 padding required for libcint env layout
decisions.rationale: Without padding, atom coordinates collide with reserved env slots like PTR_RANGE_OMEGA, activating range-separated Coulomb instead of standard Coulomb

decisions.decision: 3c2e has index swap: third shell maps to l slot, not k slot
decisions.rationale: libcint g3c2e.c sets lk_ceil=0 and ll_ceil=k_l to reuse 2e G-tensor machinery

decisions.decision: Canonicalize 3c2e evaluation to li>=lj and transpose outputs back to caller order
decisions.rationale: Matches libcint ibase-style ij handling and closed asymmetric shell-pair parity gaps

decisions.decision: Apply primitive-pair Gaussian prefactors (pdata_ij.fac * pdata_kl.fac) in 2e accumulation
decisions.rationale: Required to match vendored libcint int2e magnitude during oracle parity

next_action: Resume with `$gsd-execute-phase 10 --no-transition` to run final plan 10-06 (oracle gate closure + v1.0 UAT resolution), then verification/update routing.
context_notes: Phase 10 Wave 3 is complete: 10-04 and 10-05 landed with summaries and parity tests. Wave 4 (10-06) was spawned but intentionally stopped during pause; no 10-06 commit or summary exists yet. Resume should start directly at 10-06.
